name: Southwest Nacho Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package cream cheese (3 oz.), at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans, sour cream, cream cheese, picante sauce, chili powder and cumin. Mix thoroughly by hand, electric mixer or food processor.
2. In an 8 X 8 inches baking dish, spread half of the bean mixture in the bottom. Top with half of the cheeses. Repeat, ending with cheeses.
3. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 minutes or until heated through. Serve with chips.
